  • Civil and Environmental Engineering Directory

Civil and Environmental Engineering Directory

About our faculty and staff

Our nationally recognized faculty, researchers and professional staff are dedicated to excellence in research, education, innovation and service. Learn more about the individuals who make up the Department of Civil and Environmental Engineering by visiting their profiles.

Charles Aubeny

  • Professor, Civil & Environmental Engineering
  • Affiliated Faculty, Multidisciplinary Engineering
  • Office: DLEB 808P
  • Phone: 979-845-4478
  • Email: caubeny@civil.tamu.edu

  • Associate Department Head, Undergraduate Programs, Civil & Environmental Engineering
  • Associate Professor, Civil & Environmental Engineering
  • Affiliated Faculty, Multidisciplinary Engineering
  • Office: DLEB 702B
  • Phone: 979-845-0290
  • Email: lbarroso@civil.tamu.edu

  • Associate Professor of Practice, Civil & Environmental Engineering
